allow: PowerShell($tools = @\('node','npm','npx','git','gh','wrangler'\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output "$t : $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t : NOT FOUND" } })
Bash(mkdir -p images css js admin functions/api functions/api/admin)
Bash(git -c user.email=culinarymasterminds@gmail.com -c user.name="Culinary Masterminds" commit -m "Initial site: home, about, services, gallery, contact, admin, Cloudflare functions")
